query: SELECT ic.id, ic.provider_id, ic.status, ic.credentials_encrypted IS NOT NULL as has_creds, ip.slug, ip.name FROM integration_connections ic JOIN integration_providers ip ON ic.provider_id = ip.id WHERE ip.slug IN ('bls', 'fred', 'bea', 'census-bureau');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute SELECT ic.id, ic.provider_id, ic.status, ic.credentials_encrypted IS NOT NULL as has_creds, ip.slug, ip.name FROM integration_connections ic JOIN integration_providers ip ON ic.provider_id = ip.id WHERE ip.slug IN ('bls', 'fred', 'bea', 'census-bureau');
